previousPreviousSubMilestone.deliverable: Six-point process-safeguards suite shipped to make Phase 5.6 M-C + M-D + every future phase impossible to drift under. S1 milestone DoD template (docs/templates/milestone-dod.md). S2 CI conformance check (.github/workflows/conformance.yml + scripts/check-claim-evidence.mjs engine + scripts/check-claim-evidence.allowlist.json with 9 known gaps cross-referenced to M-A audit rows; today 86 verified / 9 allowlisted / 0 UNALLOWED out of 95). S3 pre-commit claim-evidence hook (.husky/pre-commit fast-path scoped to staged CLAUDE.md diffs; opt-in via `git config core.hooksPath .husky`). S4 Loki verifiedBy field (.loki/queue/schema.json JSON Schema 2020-12 + apps/desktop/src/loki-verified-by.test.ts 7-test validator; M-A + M-B verifiedBy backfilled in this commit so the contract holds from day one). S5 branch policy (CONTRIBUTING.md §Branch Policy: 14-day stale-branch warning + 30-day merge-or-delete + cherry-pick contract + merge-before-delete workflow). S6 quarterly conformance re-audit cadence (CONTRIBUTING.md §Quarterly Re-Audit + docs/audits/SCHEDULE.md: every 3 months OR every 5 milestones, next 2026-07-17). Plus T9 (CONTRIBUTING.md §Process Safeguards index) + 19-test claim-evidence vitest pinning + biome lint clean (0 errors / 24 warnings baseline preserved) + typecheck clean across 6 packages + full vitest 1237/1237 in 21.43s. The safeguard's first proof is its own atomic commit running clean — S2 conformance check green on commit e4f681a per acceptance #ciGate.

targets.phase56Exit: SHIPPED 2026-04-20 — all 7 sub-milestones DoD-complete, retrospective committed, CHANGELOG [1.1.1], v1.1.1 version bump, v1.1.1 tag, main/feature branch push, and worktree-phase-2-the-org deletion.
targets.phase56SurfaceArea: Conformance audit (M-A) ~200–400 rows + triage (M-B) per-row dispositions + safeguards (M-E) 6 deliverables + backend backfill (M-C) migrations/IPC/repos for restore rows + UI backfill (M-D) components/hooks/routes for restore rows + docs truth-up (M-F) three-bucket CLAUDE.md rewrite + ship (M-G) branch deletion + version bump + retrospective
targets.phase56NonGoals: No new features beyond restoration. No scope creep from mid-flight discoveries without change-control mini-gate (§14.3). No silent deferrals. No Phase 6 work until M-G ships. No public README/landing-site claim updates — those wait for M-F.
targets.phase6Next: M40 T0 Insight Export plan doc.

sprintFramework.backlog: M-B triage output — audit doc `disposition` column. Must-have=restore / Should-have=replace / Won't-have=deprecate (docs only)
sprintFramework.velocity: Per-sub-milestone Loki exit-KPI: unitTests delta, e2eSpecs delta, atomic:ledger commit ratio (target 1:1), estimate-vs-actual duration variance
sprintFramework.changeControl: Mid-flight gap → STOP current task → add audit-doc row → triage → Rocky approval → resume with expanded scope recorded; no silent growth (R7 mitigation)
sprintFramework.dor: Sprint entry gate: audit rows categorized for sub-milestone, filesTouched estimated, testsDeltaEstimate recorded, verification recipe enumerated, predecessor Loki exit-KPI closed
sprintFramework.dod: Sprint exit gate: M-E.1 milestone DoD template (ships in M-E as S1). Until M-E ships, M-A and M-B use interim DoD inline with their acceptance blocks

notes: PHASE 6 M40 T5 SHIPPED 2026-04-20 — Copilot sidebar filters and export controls implemented with TDD. Added copilot-sidebar-export source-contract test; valid red proved CopilotSidebar lacked category/severity filter controls, export scope buttons, CSV/JSON buttons, request construction, and export status copy. Sidebar now applies category/severity filters to useCopilotInsights, builds CopilotExportRequest from current filters/scope, calls useCopilotExport for local CSV/JSON export, includes companyId only for company scope, and renders row-count/basename/truncated/error status while preserving the read-only no-bus-event contract. Verification: focused renderer test 1 file / 5 tests; pnpm typecheck clean; pnpm lint 0 errors / 21 known warnings; pnpm audit:claims -- --strict 95 verified / 0 allowlisted / 0 UNALLOWED; git diff --check clean. Head-of-queue advances to M40 T6 insight export E2E.

PHASE 6 M40 T2 SHIPPED 2026-04-20 — Copilot insight export read model implemented with TDD. Added apps/desktop/src/main/db/repos/copilot-insights-export.test.ts; valid red proved listActiveForExport was missing. Added CopilotExportFilter/CopilotExportResult, listActiveForExport, serializeCopilotInsightsJson, and serializeCopilotInsightsCsv in copilot-insights repo. Export projection is active-only, supports company/all scope, category/severity filters, newest-first ordering, configurable cap with truncated flag, JSON metadata envelope, stable CSV header, and quote/newline escaping. Added a fail-closed regression for company scope without companyId so repo misuse cannot widen to all companies. Verification: focused repo test 1 file / 6 tests; pnpm typecheck clean; pnpm lint 0 errors / 21 known warnings; pnpm audit:claims -- --strict 95 verified / 0 allowlisted / 0 UNALLOWED. Head-of-queue advances to M40 T3 IPC/register/handler.

PHASE 6 M40 T1 SHIPPED 2026-04-20 — shared Copilot export contracts implemented with TDD. Added packages/shared-types/src/copilot-export.test.ts; valid red proved COPILOT_EXPORT_FORMATS/COPILOT_EXPORT_SCOPES were missing. Added COPILOT_EXPORT_FORMATS, CopilotExportFormat, COPILOT_EXPORT_SCOPES, CopilotExportScope, CopilotExportRequest, and CopilotExportResponse in packages/shared-types/src/copilot.ts. Wired copilot.export into IpcContract and TeamXApi in packages/shared-types/src/ipc.ts. Typecheck surfaced that widening TeamXApi requires the typed preload object to expose the method, so apps/desktop/src/preload/api.ts now includes the copilotExport channel constant and bridge method; main-process register/handler remain scoped to T3. Plan doc updated to record that sequencing correction. Verification: focused shared-types test 1 file / 2 tests; pnpm typecheck clean; pnpm lint 0 errors / 21 known warnings; pnpm audit:claims -- --strict 95 verified / 0 allowlisted / 0 UNALLOWED. Head-of-queue advances to M40 T2 repo export read model.

PHASE 6 M40 T0 AUTHORED 2026-04-20 — NEW docs/plans/2026-04-25-team-x-phase-6-m40-insight-export.md. Plan-doc-only milestone for local Copilot insight export. Resolves Q4: company-scope export mirrors visible sidebar category/severity filters; all-company export applies the same filters globally and is labeled global. Locks local-only boundary: no network export, phone-home, automated sharing, migration, settings key, provider/router/MCP surface, or bus event. Defines JSON metadata envelope, CSV columns/escaping, 10,000-row cap with truncated flag, M24-compatible tmpdir()/team-x-exports file contract, sidebar filters/export controls, focused tests, E2E, user-guide docs, and final verification gate. Head-of-queue advances to M40 T1 shared export contracts.

PHASE 6 M39 COMPLETE 2026-04-20 — Telemetry Per-Kind Filter shipped through T8 verification gate. Final evidence: biome checked 16 M39 files with no fixes; shared-types focused gate passed 1 file / 2 tests; desktop focused gate passed 5 files / 27 tests; pnpm typecheck clean; pnpm lint 0 errors / 21 known warnings; pnpm audit:claims -- --strict 95 verified / 0 allowlisted / 0 UNALLOWED; pnpm -F @team-x/desktop build clean; telemetry-kind-filter Playwright passed 1 spec / 1 test. M39 surface: kind contracts, repo filters, IPC validation, preload propagation, renderer hooks/query keys, filter chips, subview request wiring, and E2E. Scope boundary preserved: no migrations, settings, bus events, providers, MCP surface, or write-side run behavior. Head-of-queue advances to M40 T0 Insight Export plan doc.

PHASE 6 M39 T7 SHIPPED 2026-04-20 — telemetry kind filter Playwright E2E implemented with TDD. Added apps/desktop/e2e/telemetry-kind-filter.spec.ts; valid red reached Telemetry but failed because CompanyTelemetry lacked data-telemetry-stat="total-runs". Added the stable selector to the Total Runs stat card. The spec now creates a work run through chat.send, creates a copilot run through copilot.configure, opens Telemetry, confirms All covers filtered buckets, then verifies Copilot and Work chip totals. Verification: pnpm -F @team-x/desktop build clean; telemetry-kind-filter Playwright 1 spec / 1 test passed; pnpm typecheck clean across 6 workspace packages; pnpm lint 0 errors / 21 known warnings; pnpm audit:claims -- --strict 95 verified / 0 allowlisted / 0 UNALLOWED. E2E surface now 15 specs / 20 Playwright cases. Head-of-queue advances to M39 T8 verification gate.

PHASE 6 M39 T6 SHIPPED 2026-04-20 — telemetry subviews now apply the kind filter to aggregate requests with TDD. Added telemetry-subviews source-contract tests; valid red proved subviews accepted kindFilter but did not call telemetryRequestKind or include kind in hook requests. CompanyTelemetry now passes kind to useCompanyStats and useDailyUsage; EmployeeTelemetry passes kind to useEmployeeStats; CostBreakdown passes kind to useCostBreakdown while preserving all/7d/30d/90d date range behavior and adding kind to the memo dependency list. All maps to omitted kind through telemetryRequestKind. Verification: telemetry-subviews focused test 1 file / 3 tests; pnpm typecheck clean across 6 workspace packages; pnpm lint 0 errors / 21 known warnings; pnpm audit:claims -- --strict 95 verified / 0 allowlisted / 0 UNALLOWED. Head-of-queue advances to M39 T7 telemetry kind filter E2E.

PHASE 6 M39 T5 SHIPPED 2026-04-20 — TelemetryView kind filter chips implemented with TDD. Added telemetry-view source-contract tests; valid red proved missing filter labels, exported TelemetryKindFilterChips, default all state, data-telemetry-kind-filter selectors, and subview kindFilter props. TelemetryView now stores useState<TelemetryKindFilter>('all'), renders All/Work/Agentic/Copilot chips with aria-pressed and data selectors, and passes kindFilter to CompanyTelemetry, EmployeeTelemetry, and CostBreakdown. Subview Props were widened for the prop only; aggregate request wiring remains scoped to T6. Verification: telemetry-view focused test 1 file / 3 tests; pnpm typecheck clean across 6 workspace packages; pnpm lint 0 errors / 21 known warnings; pnpm audit:claims -- --strict 95 verified / 0 allowlisted / 0 UNALLOWED. Head-of-queue advances to M39 T6 subview request propagation.

PHASE 6 M39 T4 SHIPPED 2026-04-20 — renderer telemetry hooks and filter helper implemented with TDD. Added use-telemetry source-contract tests; valid red proved missing telemetryRequestKind, request-object hook signatures, and kind-aware query keys. Hooks now accept request objects for companyStats, dailyUsage, employeeStats, and costBreakdown; each query key includes req?.kind ?? 'all'; telemetryRequestKind maps renderer-only all to undefined while preserving work/agentic/copilot. CompanyTelemetry and EmployeeTelemetry callers were mechanically adapted to the request-object hook contract; filter UI/subview kind propagation remains scoped to T5/T6. Verification: use-telemetry focused test 1 file / 3 tests; pnpm typecheck clean across 6 workspace packages; pnpm lint 0 errors / 21 known warnings; pnpm audit:claims -- --strict 95 verified / 0 allowlisted / 0 UNALLOWED. Head-of-queue advances to M39 T5 telemetry filter chips.

PHASE 6 M39 T3 SHIPPED 2026-04-20 — telemetry IPC and preload kind propagation implemented with TDD. Added telemetry-handlers focused tests with a fake runs repo; valid red proved handlers dropped kind args and accepted invalid runtime values. Handlers now validate optional kind against TELEMETRY_RUN_KINDS before repo access and pass kind through to companyStats, dailyUsage, employeeStats, and costBreakdown. Preload companyStats/employeeStats now accept string | request-object and normalize string callers to { companyId } for backward compatibility while allowing future renderer request-object calls. Verification: telemetry-handlers focused test 1 file / 2 tests; pnpm typecheck clean across 6 workspace packages; pnpm lint 0 errors / 21 known warnings; pnpm audit:claims -- --strict 95 verified / 0 allowlisted / 0 UNALLOWED. Head-of-queue advances to M39 T4 renderer hooks and filter helpers.

PHASE 6 M39 T2 SHIPPED 2026-04-20 — runs repo per-kind telemetry aggregate filters implemented with TDD. Extended runs-telemetry seeded runs with kind, added a valid red proving companyStats(cid, agentic) still returned all three work/agentic/copilot rows, then added optional TelemetryRunKind parameters to companyStats, dailyUsage, employeeStats, and costBreakdown. All four read paths now append runs.kind = kind only when a persisted kind is provided; undefined preserves the All aggregate. Verification: runs-telemetry focused suite 1 file / 16 tests; pnpm typecheck clean across 6 workspace packages; pnpm lint 0 errors / 21 known warnings; pnpm audit:claims -- --strict 95 verified / 0 allowlisted / 0 UNALLOWED. Head-of-queue advances to M39 T3 IPC and preload kind propagation.

PHASE 6 M39 T1 SHIPPED 2026-04-20 — shared telemetry kind filter contracts implemented with TDD. Added TELEMETRY_RUN_KINDS, TelemetryRunKind, TELEMETRY_KIND_FILTERS, TelemetryKindFilter, and optional kind?: TelemetryRunKind fields to all four telemetry aggregate request types. TeamXApi companyStats/employeeStats now accept string | request-object for backward compatibility until the renderer is migrated in later M39 tasks. First red was invalid due missing Vitest globals import; corrected the test harness, then valid red proved missing runtime constants. Verification: shared-types focused test 1 file / 2 tests; pnpm typecheck clean across 6 workspace packages; pnpm lint 0 errors / 21 known warnings; pnpm audit:claims -- --strict 95 verified / 0 allowlisted / 0 UNALLOWED. Head-of-queue advances to M39 T2 runs repo per-kind aggregate filters.
